violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the condenser fan guards and some shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2026

Thermometers are lacking in the TCS refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 01/17/2025

The door to the outside, located toward the back/side of the store, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the dairy shelving have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Shelving must be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 01/17/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back room area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025
The hand-washing sink in the restroom was lacking paper towels. Paper towels must be available at all times for proper hand-washing. New Violation. Correct By: 07/19/2023
Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above milk/cream in the slide cold hold unit. Raw products must be stored below ready-to-eat products. New Violation. Correct By: 07/19/2023

Per interview, staff does not sanitize coffee pots/utensils after washing and rinsing them in a sink in the coffee area. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/19/2023

The door to the outside, located at the back/side of the store, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/19/2023
Beverages were observed stored on the floor in the back area of the store. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 07/19/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solution for the 2-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 07/19/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving in the dairy slide cold hold unit have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Shelving is to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 07/19/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back area of the store. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/19/2023
